subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Rafi', wondrous bearer of the manifestation of divine mercy! They subjected him to the most grievous of all the world's torments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل رفیع بدیع حامل ظهور رحمت الهی او را ببدترین عذابی از عذابهای عالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @martyrs and martyrdom
